***  

THE DISCLOSURE THAT CHELATION THERAPY WAS USED TO TREAT AUTISM IS PRESENTED AS A RESEARCH FINDING AND NOT AS A MEDICAL RECOMMENDATION. THE INFORMATION IS NOT INTENDED TO REPLACE STANDARD TREATMENT AND IS NOT A SUBSTITUTE FOR MEDICAL ADVICE.
